column1: # Vat.gr.1291, f.5v — Ptolemy, Handy Tables: Oblique Ascensions for Klima V (Byzantion, longest day = 15h)

# This folio contains: ΚΑΡΚΙΝΟΥ (Cancer), ΛΕΟΝΤΟΣ (Leo), ΠΑΡΘΕΝΟΥ (Virgo - partial, continues to next image)
# Columns per sign: degree | ΑΝΑΦΟΡΑΙ (deg) | ὩΡΩΝ (hours) | ΧΡΟΝΩΝ (time-degrees)
# Values are CUMULATIVE from start of Aries (vernal equinox)
# Notation: ō = zero; ϛ = stigma (6); ϟ = koppa (90); [?] = uncertain reading
